new_claims.claim_text: The U.S.-Iran peace deal just got officially CANCELLED and will cause a market crash on Monday.
new_claims.notes: Alarmist claim linking geopolitical events to market volatility. Requires verification.

new_claims.claim_text: Iran says no plans for further US peace talks as it vows to continue stranglehold over Strait of Hormuz.
new_claims.notes: Claim from Nypost regarding Iran's stance on peace talks and control over a vital international waterway. Requires independent verification.
